name: Korro Bio, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness. Overview We are a biopharmaceutical company with a mission to discover, develop and commercialize a new class of genetic medicines based on editing RNA, enabling the treatment of both rare and highly prevalent diseases. We are generating a portfolio of differentiated programs that are designed to harness the bodys natural RNA editing process to effect a precise yet transient change to a single nucleoside (adenosine to an inosine edit).
